content:
type: STATUS
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding idle_timeout_s param + _last_chunk_ts to __init__, a timestamp refresh line in receive() right after chunk_message extraction, and new tick(now_ts=None) method appended after receive()/flush(). Will use targeted Edits, not full-file rewrites -- please do the same so we don't clobber each other.
